title: Kanbus clock header spacing pixels
description: Adjust header spacing for ID/type/status to exact pixel gaps and preserve status word gaps as 2px spacers.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented header spacing with explicit pixel spacers (3px between parts, 2px for status word gaps) via TextSpan.advance_px. Updated Kanbus clock header rendering + prefix selection. Tests: uv run pytest tests/test_info_dsl.py tests/test_kanbus_clock.py -q

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Added repo project_key fallback for header prefix when kbs show fails; status spacing uses 2px word gaps and 3px separators. Tests: uv run pytest tests/test_info_dsl.py tests/test_kanbus_clock.py -q

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Fixed prefix selection to prefer repo project_key when kbs show returns an ID with that prefix, even if requested id is UUID fragment. Tests: uv run pytest tests/test_kanbus_clock.py -q

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Verified on device: header prefix shows project key and spacing is correct.
